scripts.cf:build: NEXT_PRIVATE_STANDALONE=true NEXT_PRIVATE_OUTPUT_TRACE_ROOT=$(pwd)/../.. next build && node scripts/fix-standalone-for-opennext.cjs && node scripts/ensure-styled-jsx-dist.cjs && opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipNextBuild --dangerouslyUseUnsupportedNextVersion && node scripts/patch-worker-bypass-api-middleware.cjs && node scripts/patch-server-handler-require-middleware-manifest.cjs
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: wrangler deploy --env production --dry-run --outdir .open-next/deploy && node scripts/patch-bundle-require.cjs && OPEN_NEXT_DEPLOY=true wrangler deploy --env production --no-bundle --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.cf:deploy:prod:patched: wrangler deploy --env production --dry-run --outdir .open-next/deploy && node scripts/patch-bundle-require.cjs && OPEN_NEXT_DEPLOY=true wrangler deploy --env production --no-bundle --config wrangler.deploy.toml
scripts.deploy: bun run cf:build && bun run cf:deploy
scripts.deploy:staging: bun run cf:build && bun run cf:deploy:staging
scripts.deploy:prod: bun run cf:build && bun run cf:deploy:prod
